test_cases.description: Attempt to create author without required name field

test_cases.description: List authors with skip and limit parameters

test_cases.description: Retrieve an existing author by ID

test_cases.description: Attempt to get a non-existent author

test_cases.description: Update author with stale If-Match header

test_cases.description: Delete an author that has no associated books

test_cases.description: Attempt to delete an author that still has books

test_cases.description: Create a valid category with name

test_cases.description: Attempt to create a category with a duplicate name

test_cases.name: delete_category_with_books_returns_409
test_cases.description: Attempt to delete a category that has associated books

test_cases.name: create_book_success
test_cases.description: Create a valid book with all required fields

test_cases.description: Attempt to create a book with an existing ISBN

test_cases.name: get_book_success_with_etag
test_cases.description: Retrieve a book and verify ETag header is present

test_cases.description: Attempt to get a book that has been soft-deleted

test_cases.name: soft_delete_book_success
test_cases.description: Soft delete an existing book

test_cases.name: restore_soft_deleted_book_success
test_cases.description: Restore a previously soft-deleted book

test_cases.name: restore_non_deleted_book_returns_400
test_cases.description: Attempt to restore a book that is not deleted

test_cases.name: create_review_success
test_cases.description: Add a valid review to an existing book

test_cases.name: create_review_on_deleted_book_returns_410
test_cases.description: Attempt to add a review to a soft-deleted book

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_old_book_success
test_cases.description: Apply a valid discount to a book published more than 1 year ago

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_new_book_returns_400
test_cases.description: Attempt to apply discount to a book published less than 1 year ago

test_cases.description: Attempt to decrease stock below zero
